Yeast
Main Navigation DocsTutorialsReferenceReleases

Appearance

YeastTurn a folder into real VMs.

Linux-first local VM orchestration for QEMU/KVM. One YAML file. One command. Real machines.

Get Started
GitHub

YAML-Driven

One yeast.yaml defines your entire lab. No GUI, no clicks. Version control your infrastructure.

Snapshots

Stop VMs, take snapshots, restore to any state. Safe lab reset in seconds.

Private Networking

Private lab networks for multi-VM environments. VM-to-VM communication out of the box.

Cloud-Init Provisioning

VMs are provisioned with cloud-init on first boot. No manual configuration required.

JSON Automation

Stable JSON output and event streams for scripting and integration with other tools.

Real VMs

Full hardware virtualization with QEMU/KVM. Not containers. Real Linux machines.

Install Yeast

curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Twarga/yeast/main/install.sh | bash

Quick Start

$ mkdir my-lab && cd my-lab
$ yeast init
$ yeast pull ubuntu-24.04
$ yeast up
$ yeast ssh
